title: Product Requirements Document
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of a PRD document produced by the ProductOwner agent. The Markdown body is human-readable and not validated by this schema.

prd_version.description: Revision counter starting at 1, incremented on each ProductOwner revision

iteration_ref.description: The iteration_version this PRD belongs to, e.g. iter-20260506-01

status.description: draft: ProductOwner wrote it; challenged: Challenger reviewed it; confirmed: user approved it

authored_by.description: Role that authored this PRD, typically product-owner

challenged_by.description: Role that reviewed this PRD adversarially, typically challenger

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last update, must include timezone
